content.en:
"The first layer of the Wumu body is really difficult to cultivate, and it is impossible to cultivate it for the first time!"

Ye Tian soon ushered in defeat.

Rumble!!!!

His physical body began to crack, but the Ka Ye Wisdom Body was repairing his physical body, after all, his Ka Ye Wisdom Body had reached the first level of the Great Completion Realm, and his recovery speed was very fast, far surpassing the other third realm extradimensional realms.

In the end, his replica body was only severely damaged, and did not fall, and if he was given enough time, he would still be able to recover, but this time his cultivation failed, and his physical potential was damaged, unless there was an incomparably precious treasure to repair the damage to the foundation.

But he didn't care, and directly lifted this copy body, and let the second copy body continue to cultivate the first layer of the black mother's body.

The second time, he was very smooth, avoiding "963" and avoiding mistakes.

Soon.

Ye Tian completely practiced the diagram of the black mother, and then the diagram of the black mother was integrated into the body, and began to cause the transformation of his physical body, but at this time, the body of the black mother and the wisdom body of the Jiaye conflicted, but this rejection was far lower than the rejection of the original Jiaye wisdom body and the black fog multidimensional body.

"Sure enough, the compatibility between the Wumu body and the Ka Ye multi-dimensional body should be very high, and this is a complete innate multi-dimensional Dao body, which is much less than the original rejection of the Ka Ye Zhi body and the black mist multi-dimensional body. "

Ye Tian suppressed the rejection and used various resources to promote the transformation of the black mother's body.

As time passed, the first layer of the black mother's body gradually completed its transformation, and the rejection continued.

However, with Ye Tian's current strength, it would be no problem to at least suppress and exclude thousands of extradimensional eras.

However, if the problem of exclusion is not solved, it will not be possible to attack the fourth realm in the future.

"I hope that there is a solution in the inheritance of the Wumu Realm Lord, otherwise I can only give up an innate multi-dimensional Dao body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The effect of the first layer of the body of the black mother is beyond that of the wisdom body of the Kasya, and the first layer of the body of the black mother alone can enhance the physical body by fifty times, which is still the realm of the first layer, while the first entry of the wisdom body of the Kasha can only enhance the physical body by thirty times.

If the wisdom body of the Buddha is cultivated to the limit of the second layer of Dacheng, it can increase the physical body by two hundred times, but the cultivation of the body of the black mother to the limit of the first layer of Dacheng has the strength of the physical body of one hundred and fifty times, and it can be seen that the limit of the second layer of Dacheng is definitely far more than two hundred times.

In such a comparison, the Kasa wisdom body is very ordinary.

In addition, the body of the black mother also has an extremely terrifying defensive effect, and its supporting innate multi-dimensional secret technique, the realm of the black mother, once unfolded, can draw energy from the depths of the superdimensional void, continuously replenish energy, and can fight for a long time.

If you cooperate with the realm of Wumu to create a forbidden super-dimensional supernatural power that exhausts the strength of the whole body, then the combat power is very terrifying, and you can use that kind of taboo-type super-dimensional supernatural power as a general attack to exert it!

"There are a total of five realms in the body of the black mother, and it is absolutely impossible to give up, if the problem of rejection cannot be solved, then you can only give up the wisdom body of the Ka Ye!"

Ye Tian said so secretly.

......

The inheritance of the lord of the Wumu realm.

In front of the true picture of Wumu.

Ye Tian's duplicate body came to cultivate the body of the black mother again, and he quickly succeeded in cultivating.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon on the side was dumbfounded, he didn't see the first layer of the real Black Mother Body, but Ye Tian had already practiced, what kind of efficiency is this!

He was really stimulated!

After Ye Tian practiced the first layer of the black mother's body, the black mother's true figure released a ray of light that enveloped Ye Tian, and the outside world couldn't see what was happening inside at all.

Now.

Ye Tian was picking a reward.

He has practiced the first layer of the black mother's body, which is equivalent to the success of the test.

"Very good, good stuff!"

Ye Tian couldn't wait to choose all the treasures listed in Wumu's true map, but he could only choose the same.

Jiuwutu: It can assist in comprehending the extradimensional rules, and is helpful to the extra-dimensional realm below the realm of a hundred extra-dimensional rules, and can also be used as a defensive weapon, and the weapon level is comparable to that of super-dimensional Dao soldiers.

As a weapon, these nine Utu are equivalent to a weapon at the level of a super-dimensional Dao soldier, and it can also assist in comprehending the super-dimensional rules, as long as his super-dimensional rule realm does not exceed a hundred, it has an auxiliary role.

Such a precious item, such a force as the Blazing Sun Palace may not necessarily have it, and even if it does, it will be regarded as a treasure of the town palace........

He naturally needed such a treasure, so he chose it.

Wow!

Jiuwutu appeared in his hand in an instant, was picked up by him, and will completely belong to him in the future.

He didn't show it to the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, after all, it was a reward that belonged to him.

Immediately afterward, the Wumu True Picture sent another message, which was about the content of the second test.

The second assessment content surprised him very much, because the second test required him to practice two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies and perfectly solve the problem of rejection.

Ye Tian has already cultivated two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, this can be skipped directly, and then he only needs to solve the problem of rejection to pass the second test.

If Ye Tian was allowed to ponder and study it by himself, it would definitely not be able to study it.

But the lord of the Wumu Realm also gave a secret method - the Three Wu Secret Method.

The first layer of this three-black secret method can allow the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies to initially solve the problem of rejection, but if you want to use the power of the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies as you like without any problems, you must cultivate this secret method to the limit realm of the first layer of Dacheng.

Soon.

Ye Tian accepted the secret method of the Three Crows.

"The secret method of the Three Black is too mysterious, if I were to create it, I would not be able to create it at all. "

Ye Tian was very excited.

Immediately after that, he was going to cultivate the Three Wu Secret Method, once the initial practice was completed, the problem of rejection in his body would be preliminarily solved, and his combat power would be 1.5 at that time, and he could definitely easily defeat the ordinary Fourth Realm Extradimensional Realm.

Airplanes!

The light radiated, and the true picture of the black mother changed into its normal appearance.

At this time, the Tricky Wood Red Dragon said, "Ye Tian, have you practiced the first layer of the Black Mother's body?" have you received a reward, and is there any Black Mother True Liquid in the reward?"

Ye Tian nodded and said, "Well, I have already practiced to the first layer of the body of the black mother, and there are many treasures in the reward list, I took a look, and there is indeed the true liquid of the black mother!"

"It's good to have!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon was very excited and motivated in his heart, he decided to practice to the first layer of the black mother's body, once he practiced, he would completely take off!

Ye Tian didn't disturb the cultivation of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, he was ready to start cultivating the Three Black Secret Method.
